name: trace_window_undo
description: v2.7.3 W3 (M2 gate): the real commit seam applies a covering window [2026-05-28..2026-08-13] (keeps the auto-fit axis tick set) that takes the IN-PLACE reconcile branch (nothing enters/leaves, group identity survives), then ONE external CommandBars.ExecuteMso Undo restores the pre PP_DOC (window fields gone) AND every child shape's geometry together (single undo entry, SR-WIN-27/SR-SMO-08). A +1d nudge of the still-selected task is the cache-poisoning trap: the PP_DOC drift probe must re-sync the scene cache at read-back so the undone window is NOT resurrected -> post-nudge dump shows empty windowStart/End, the nudged dates (discovery 2026-06-02..2026-06-13) and an auto-fit PP_PROJ (pad>=1).
